sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36414" key="e)nupo/keimai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνυπό-κειμαι</orth>, <sense id="n36414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">subsist in,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐ. καὶ τᾷ ὄψι καὶ τῷ ἀέρι τὸ δυνάμι διαφανές</foreign> Aristombr. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.52.21</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:11p.438M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11p.438M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
